meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Finish Your Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your SaaS builds. Learn how the Antigravity project template and Claude Code help you ship production-ready apps faster.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from scope creep and architectural paralysis. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you enforce a modular, opinionated structure that prevents over-engineering. Pairing this with Claude Code automates boilerplate, allowing you to focus purely on core business logic and rapid iteration to reach deployment.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial spark of a project, the flurry of commits, and then the slow, crushing weight of feature creep. Your GitHub repository sits gathering digital dust, a testament to 'what could have been.' The graveyard of unfinished side projects is the biggest obstacle between you and a career as a high-impact software engineer.

But what if you could bypass the paralysis? The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it's a structural scaffold designed to keep your momentum high and your scope contained. By integrating this with the raw power of Claude Code, you transition from a 'coder' who struggles to finish, into a 'builder' who ships with lethal precision.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the project foundation using the template to ensure consistent directory architecture and environment configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity template for a Next.js SaaS app with Supabase integration and Tailwind CSS. Focus on a clean directory structure.

steps.title: Define the Atomic Feature Set
steps.description: Prevent scope creep by forcing your project to adhere to a strict set of initial requirements before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project scope and extract the top 3 core features. Create a 'features.md' file that strictly limits the MVP to these items.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate features.md based on MVP scope'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the repetitive data models and API routes based on your Antigravity schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the API route handlers and database types for the authentication and user profile module defined in the schema.

steps.title: Rapid Iteration Loop
steps.description: Execute your build cycle by focusing on one UI component at a time, using Claude Code to verify integration against your template's standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the dashboard layout using the Antigravity UI component library. Ensure mobile responsiveness.

steps.title: Deployment and Verification
steps.description: Perform a final check against the template's linting and security requirements to ensure the project is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the Antigravity audit script to check for security vulnerabilities and code standard violations.

pro_tips: Treat your 'features.md' as a legal document; never add a feature without deleting an existing one to maintain scope balance.
Use Claude Code's '--watch' mode to catch architectural regressions in your Antigravity structure in real-time.
Implement a 'Friday Ship' rule: if a feature isn't functional by Friday, revert the branch and refine the scope for Monday.
Leverage the Antigravity middleware layer to centralize your logging; it saves hours of debugging production state issues.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' first; 80% of users only care about the primary workflow, so optimize that before handling edge cases.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, document your learning process in a README.md and share your repository with the community to get feedback on your architectural choices.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your brilliant ideas die in a terminal. With the Antigravity template and Claude Code, you have the infrastructure to turn your concepts into live, scalable products. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
